summary: Comprehensive testing of new 3-tier role-based permission system (owner > admin > mod > user). All backend API tests passed (15/15). Frontend role-based UI elements verified working correctly.

issues: React key duplication warnings in console for chat messages (same as previous iterations)

backend_api_tests: API health check - accessible and returning rooms
Regular user blocked from join-direct endpoint (403)
Mod user login and role verification
Admin user login and role verification
Seat requests endpoint requires mod/admin/owner permission (403 for regular user)
Join-direct endpoint exists and responds correctly
Non-owner email gets 'user' role on registration
Role change endpoint requires owner permission (403 for non-owner)
Valid role values test (user, mod, admin)
Complete user seat request flow e2e test
List all users with roles verification
frontend_ui_tests: Mod user sees 'اصعد للمنصة' (direct join) button - CORRECT
Mod user sees 'طلبات الصعود' (seat requests) section - CORRECT
Regular user sees 'طلب الصعود للمنصة' (request seat) button - CORRECT
Regular user does NOT see seat requests section - CORRECT
Admin can see users list in admin dashboard
Admin does NOT see role change dropdown (only owner can) - CORRECT

critical_code_review_comments: Role hierarchy properly implemented in backend (owner > admin > mod > user)
Permission functions (can_manage_stage, can_kick_mute, can_manage_rooms, can_promote_users) correctly check roles
Frontend correctly checks user.role for showing appropriate UI elements
Admin dashboard access control works correctly (admin and owner can access)
Role change dropdown only appears for owner users in admin panel
seed_data_creation: Created test users: TEST_roletest_*, TEST_notowner_*, TEST_flowtest_* during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role system is fully functional. Owner emails are hardcoded. Test credentials work for all roles. Room ID 3977f7ae used for stage/seat testing. React key warnings in console are a low-priority cosmetic issue.
